regional_cost_note: Builders in Tauranga typically charge $85–$120/hr. New build costs range $2,800–$4,000/m². Bay of Plenty is NZ’s fastest-growing region; book builders well in advance.

businesses.name: Nativise Construction
businesses.known_for: Locally owned and operated with over 15 years in the trade, specialising in residential building, landscaping, and kitchens & bathrooms.

businesses.name: Bayclad Limited
businesses.known_for: Specialising in cladding (new and re-clads), residential new builds in timber and steel frame, retaining walls, and decking.

businesses.name: A.J. Works Interiors Limited
businesses.known_for: Over 20 years delivering high-quality interior building work including plastering, painting & decorating, and residential renovations for residential and commercial projects.

businesses.name: Wood In Spirit
businesses.known_for: Specialising in renovating older Bay of Plenty homes using sustainable practices, with expertise in extensions, cladding, decking, and interior installations.

businesses.name: CCA Projects
businesses.known_for: Over 20 years of hands-on construction experience specialising in repairs, maintenance, renovations, timber fencing, decking, and joinery.
